completionsAPI.python:
from openai import OpenAI
import os

client = OpenAI(
    # еҰӮжһңжІЎжңүй…ҚзҪ®зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҢиҜ·з”ЁйҳҝйҮҢдә‘зҷҫзӮјAPI KeyжӣҝжҚўпјҡapi_key="sk-xxx"
    api_key=os.getenv("DASHSCOPE_API_KEY"),
    base_url="https://[workspace-id].cn-beijing.maas.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1",
)

messages = [{"role": "user", "content": "дҪ жҳҜи°Ғ"}]
completion = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="qwen3.6-max-preview",  # жӮЁеҸҜд»ҘжҢүйңҖжӣҙжҚўдёәе…¶е®ғж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғжЁЎеһӢ
    messages=messages,
    extra_body={"enable_thinking": True},
    stream=True
)
is_answering = False  # жҳҜеҗҰиҝӣе…ҘеӣһеӨҚйҳ¶ж®ө
print("\n" + "=" * 20 + "жҖқиҖғиҝҮзЁӢ" + "=" * 20)
for chunk in completion:
    if not chunk.choices:
        continue
    delta = chunk.choices[0].delta
    if hasattr(delta, "reasoning_content") and delta.reasoning_content is not None:
        if not is_answering:
            print(delta.reasoning_content, end="", flush=True)
    if hasattr(delta, "content") and delta.content:
        if not is_answering:
            print("\n" + "=" * 20 + "е®Ңж•ҙеӣһеӨҚ" + "=" * 20)
            is_answering = True
        print(delta.content, end="", flush=True)

default.python:
import os
from dashscope import Generation
import dashscope
dashscope.base_http_api_url = 'https://[workspace-id].cn-beijing.maas.aliyuncs.com/api/v1'

messages = [
    {"role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant."},
    {"role": "user", "content": "дҪ жҳҜи°Ғпјҹ"},
]
response = Generation.call(
    # иӢҘжІЎжңүй…ҚзҪ®зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҢиҜ·з”ЁзҷҫзӮјAPI Keyе°ҶдёӢиЎҢжӣҝжҚўдёәпјҡapi_key = "sk-xxx",
    api_key=os.getenv("DASHSCOPE_API_KEY"),
    model="qwen3.6-max-preview",
    messages=messages,
    result_format="message",
    # ејҖеҗҜж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғ
    enable_thinking=True,
)

if response.status_code == 200:
    # жү“еҚ°жҖқиҖғиҝҮзЁӢ
    print("=" * 20 + "жҖқиҖғиҝҮзЁӢ" + "=" * 20)
    print(response.output.choices[0].message.reasoning_content)
    
    # жү“еҚ°еӣһеӨҚ
    print("=" * 20 + "е®Ңж•ҙеӣһеӨҚ" + "=" * 20)
    print(response.output.choices[0].message.content)
else:
    print(f"HTTPиҝ”еӣһз Ғпјҡ{response.status_code}")
    print(f"й”ҷиҜҜз Ғпјҡ{response.code}")
    print(f"й”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜпјҡ{response.message}")
